parents.subject: LU-12668 ec: add tests for mirror verify for EC components

commit.subject: LU-12668 ec: add test that verifying stale ec mirror fails
commit.message:
LU-12668 ec: add test that verifying stale ec mirror fails

Add test that verifying a file with stale ec components will
fail.

Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I1c22794a926f4b0b121d412822d78edcf3612780
